tasks.evidence: First open is camera-first with visible '拍照识别'. Tapping it reaches '拍清包装文字', then '上传识别' accepts a catalog image and enters '正在整理配料和营养信息...'.
sample-01 produced a clear single-product purchase decision: '该不该买 / 谨慎 / 橙味饮料', score 38, packaging-source evidence, allergen warning, and action CTAs.
sample-03 produced '信息不足' and '还不能下购买结论' instead of guessing. It listed missing 配料表 and 营养成分表, then asked the user to 补拍配料表.
From the insufficient-info report, tapping '补拍配料表' opened a targeted recovery capture page with target=ingredient and '已带入上一张：商品名'.

sample-08 then sample-09 completed the two-product flow. The comparison showed A/B scores, sugar, carbs, sodium, allergens, additives, and correctly warned that both contain milk before declaring a winner.
Home profile switching to 控糖 changed the later sample-01 report from default cautious handling to '不建议', '按控糖判断', and a sugar-threshold explanation.
Saving changed the report CTA to '查看已保存' and avoid changed it to '查看避雷'. Returning home showed '0 保存 / 1 避雷' plus recent judgments that can be reopened or compared.
The report/comparison explicitly explains value beyond generic AI: packaging evidence, profile-prioritized decisions, same-screen A/B nutrition and additive comparison, and source-checkable text.

notes: The app avoids overclaiming when labels are incomplete and keeps packaging evidence visible.
Comparison is the strongest differentiator because it fixes A/B metrics on screen instead of making the user ask repeated generic AI questions.
Profile-aware recalculation is visible and materially changes the decision.

issues.title: One complete-looking sample remained in a generation state at sweep timeout
issues.evidence: sample-02 screenshot shows '已识别，正在生成购买建议' and '生成中' after the sweep wait, with primary actions visually disabled.
issues.suggestedDirection: Add a visible timeout/retry/cancel path that preserves the selected image and explains whether generation is still running or failed.

issues.title: Save and avoid bucket semantics are ambiguous after both actions
issues.evidence: After '查看已保存' was visible, adding the same report to avoid returned home with '0 保存 / 1 避雷'. The home copy says save and avoid are separated, but not whether avoid replaces saved.
issues.suggestedDirection: Clarify whether 避雷 moves a report out of saved, or count both states consistently with explicit copy.

issues.title: Sticky action area duplicates major actions and crowds lower evidence
issues.evidence: Comparison and report screenshots show repeated bottom CTAs such as '拍下一款对比' plus another fixed row, partly covering lower content.
issues.suggestedDirection: Use one persistent action row with enough bottom spacer, and keep secondary actions in a single predictable row.
